title: OlymMATH Numeric Small
description: Optimize a single-file numeric solver on a small exact-answer olympiad-style benchmark.
baseline_summary: A placeholder solver that does not parse the problem and therefore misses the benchmark set.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact-match rate is better on the hidden exact-answer benchmark.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(problem: str) must return a numeric answer as text. Preserve the function signature and avoid hard-coding per-item ids.
